query:
SELECT 'sasboss_enterprises' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM sasboss_enterprises
UNION ALL SELECT 'sasboss_services', COUNT(*) FROM sasboss_services
UNION ALL SELECT 'sasboss_pricebook', COUNT(*) FROM sasboss_pricebook
UNION ALL SELECT 'sasboss_did_inventory', COUNT(*) FROM sasboss_did_inventory
UNION ALL SELECT 'sasboss_invoices', COUNT(*) FROM sasboss_invoices;
